name: Frederick Earnest
background: Mr. Earnest has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Vista Gold Corp. since January 2012. He joined the company in 2006 as Senior Vice President and Project Manager, later becoming President and Chief Operating Officer in 2007. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at Pacific Rim Mining Corp. and various engineering and management positions.

company_affiliations.name: Vista Gold Corp.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director

company_affiliations.name: Perpetua Resources Corp. (formerly Midas Gold Corp.)
